---
title: "waterbird_drought"
author: "Dana Lanceman"
date: "8/27/2021"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r set up}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(viridis)
library(rstatix)
library(ggpubr)

wbd <- read_excel("C:/Users/danal/OneDrive - UNSW/Desktop/Honours_UNSW/Assessment/cumbung_assessment/raw/waterbird_derived_complex.xlsx", "percentages")
```


```{r  plot}
ggplot(wbd, aes(Drought,Percentage_complex)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter() +
  labs(x = "", y = "% Waterbirds at  Great Cumbung Swamp") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c('Dry','Other')) +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),)
```



Make sure to test assumptions!




```{r assumptions}
ggqqplot(wbd, "Percentage_complex")

par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(wbd)

ggplot(wbd, aes(Percentage_complex)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 3)
```

```{r t test}
wbd %>% t_test(Percentage_complex~Drought)
```
